description_long: This is a compact, handheld electric drill with a robust, ergonomic design, primarily colored in black and blue. The body features a textured grip handle for secure holding, and the front section houses a metallic chuck for attaching drill bits. The side of the drill displays the 'KOBALT' brand name and '24V MAX' power rating, indicating it is a cordless, battery-powered model. The rear of the drill shows the 'XTR' marking, and the base is shaped to accommodate a detachable battery pack. Several screws and seams are visible, suggesting a durable, assembled construction, and there are subtle ventilation slots on the upper body for cooling. The overall appearance is modern and professional, suitable for use in garages, workshops, or urban maintenance settings.
description: A black and blue cordless electric drill with a textured grip, visible brand markings, and a detachable battery pack base. The design is robust and ergonomic, with metallic chuck and subtle ventilation slots.
description_view_0: Side view showing the 'KOBALT' logo, '24V MAX' marking, and detailed grip texture.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the metallic chuck and the cylindrical drill head.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with 'KOBALT' and 'ENDLESS' branding, and clear view of the handle and battery base.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the 'XTR' marking and the back of the handle and battery compartment.
